bulkPinCodeDTO.description: An array of the following object (up to maximum of 10 pin codes): ExpiryDate format yyyy-MM-DD HH:mm:ss. If ExpiryDate is not null, ExpiryTimeZone should be provided

InviteType.description: integer value from 1 to 6. 1: NewKindooUser, 2: ExistingUserNewMasterLicense, 3: ExistingUserMasterLicenseExistUserDidNotReply, 4: ExistingUserMasterLicenseExistAccepted, 5:ExistingUserMasterLicenseExistNotAccepted, 6: ExistingUserMasterLicenseRevoked

InviteTypeName.description: string type name, on of the following values: NewKindooUser, ExistingUserNewMasterLicense, ExistingUserMasterLicenseExistUserDidNotReply, ExistingUserMasterLicenseExistAccepted, ExistingUserMasterLicenseExistNotAccepted, ExistingUserMasterLicenseRevoked

InviteType.description: integer value from 1 to 6. 1: NewKindooUser, 2: ExistingUserNewMasterLicense, 3: ExistingUserMasterLicenseExistUserDidNotReply, 4: ExistingUserMasterLicenseExistAccepted, 5:ExistingUserMasterLicenseExistNotAccepted, 6: ExistingUserMasterLicenseRevoked

InviteTypeName.description: string type name, on of the following values: NewKindooUser, ExistingUserNewMasterLicense, ExistingUserMasterLicenseExistUserDidNotReply, ExistingUserMasterLicenseExistAccepted, ExistingUserMasterLicenseExistNotAccepted, ExistingUserMasterLicenseRevoked

userInvitationObject.description: This should be an array of the following object: UserEmail is the email of the user you want to invite. UserRole set 0 for administrator, 1 for manager, 2 for guest, 3 for installer. Description is a open text field to set a small description for the user invited. CCInEmail set to true if you want to be CC in the invitation email. IsTempUser set to true if you want the user to be temporary, if set to true ExpiryDate StartAccessDoorsDate and ExpiryTimeZone properties should be set. ExpiryDate is of format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss and is the date and time of when the user will be removed from the site. StartAccessDoorsDate is of format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss and is the date and time the user access rights are activated. ExpiryTimeZone is the standard name of the C# timezone can be fetched by api call KindooGetTimeZones, ExpiryDate and StartAccessDoorsDate will be transformed to UTC according to the timezone set

UserRole.description: The role of the user (0=admin, 1=manager, 2=guest and 3=installer).

Description.description: Description of the user only on type D sites (if not set, it will default to null).

CCInEmail.description: Whether to CC the user in the email.

IsTempUser.description: Only on type D sites (if not set, it will default to false).

ExpiryDate.description: Date and time when the user's access expires.

StartAccessDoorsDate.description: Date and time when the user's access to doors starts.

ExpiryTimeZone.description: Time zone for the expiry date.

userInvitationEmail.description: This should be an array user emails

licenseRevokeExample.description: This should be an array of license IDs (GUID)

betweenScheduleObject.description: An array of the following object: id is always set to -1. FROM of format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss. TO of format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss. DayOfWeek set to -1

weeklyScheduleObject.description: An array of the following object: id is always set to -1. FROM of format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss, the date is not relative here, the time is important. TO of format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss, the date is not relative here, the time is important. DayOfWeek set 0 for Sunday, 1 for monday, 2 for tuesday, 3 for wednesday, 4 for thursday, 5 for friday, 6 for saturday

entryPointParamObject.description: Array of entry point IDs. set to [] if AllEntryPoints is set to true

childrenIDParamWithoutAllDescObject.description: The ChildrenIDs property from a fetched weekly access rule.

holidayEventObject.description: an array of object with the following properties: FROM is of format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss, if IsHoliday is true this property should be fetched from /KindooGetHolidaysByCountryAndYear, if IsHoliday is false then you can set it to any date you want. TO is of format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm:ss, if IsHoliday is true this property should be fetched from /KindooGetHolidaysByCountryAndYear, if IsHoliday is false then you can set it to any date you want. InludeInAccessRules set to true if you want to give access rights according to FROM-TO you set, set to false if you want to deny access rights according to FROM-TO you set. IsHoliday set to true if it is a holiday fetched by KindooGetHolidaysByCountryAndYear, set false to make it a special event. HolidayName, if the IsHoliday is set to true then set from the name fetched from KindooGetHolidaysByCountryAndYear, if the IsHoliday is set to false you can set a free text to specify your special event. HolidayCountryID, if the IsHoliday is set to true set it as the CountryID fetched from KindooGetHolidaysByCountryAndYear, if the IsHoliday is set to false set it to null

unauthorizedResponse.description: Unauthorized - your session is not valid

TimeZone.description: StandardName of the c# timezone, can be fetched by api call KindooGetTimeZones(required when IsTemp is true)

post.summary: Set user description
Set user third party ref field by environment user id

post.summary: Retrieves the list of all access permissions (access rules and access rights) of a Kindoo user.Use KindooGetUserAccessPermissions

UID.description: The user ID (Exact match with Kindoo UID).

EID.description: The environmnent id to retrieve access rules for

Keyword.description: search by KIN name, send empty string if not needed)

post.summary: Revokes an always/FROM-TO access rule by ID in Kindoo.Use KindooRevokeAlwaysAccessRightByID or KindooRevokeFromToAccessRightByID instead

ID.description: The ID refers to the unique identifier for an access rule that is being revoked.

post.summary: Revokes an weekly access rule by ID in Kindoo.Use KindooRevokeWeeklyAccessRightByID instead

ID.description: The ID refers to the unique identifier for an access rule that is being revoked.

ChildrenIDs.description: The ChildrenIDs property from a fetched weekly access rule.

post.summary: Saves an always access rule to a user in Kindoo.Use KindooSaveAlwaysAccessRight instead

EID.description: The site ID to which the user belongs

ALL.description: If set to true, grants the user access to all entry points in the site

EntryPointIDs.description: Array of entry point IDs. set to [] if All is set to true

UID.description: The user id (Exact match with Kindoo UID).

post.summary: Saves a weekly access rule to a user in Kindoo.Use KindooSaveWeeklyAccessRight instead

post.summary: Cloning access rules from one user to another.Use KindooCloneUserAccessPermissions instead

UserIDCloneFrom.description: GUID and should match the kindoo user id.

EuIDCloneTo.description: GUID and should match the kindoo EUID.

post.summary: Cloning access rules from one entry point to another.Use KindooEntryPointCloneAccessPermissions instead

EntryPointIDToCloneFrom.description: entry point id to clone from.

post.summary: Launches a process that generates a file with a 24 hour lifetime that contains all users' access rights for all sites that belong to a given organization. The content of the generated file follows the ruleArray schema structure as described in the schemas section below.Use OrganizationKindooGetUserAccessPermissions instead

schema.description: The request id to be used in the function OrganizationGetDataApiRequestFileURL

post.summary: Launches a process that generates a file with a 24 hour lifetime that contains all access schedules for all sites that belong to a given organization. The content of the generated file follows the accessScheduleObjectArray schema structure as described in the schemas section below.Use OrganizationKindooGetEnvironmentsAccessRules instead

schema.description: The request id to be used in the function OrganizationGetDataApiRequestFileURL

post.summary: Add a user to a list of access rules. Use KindooAddAUserToAListOfAccessRules

UID.description: The user ID (Exact match with Kindoo UID).

post.summary: Get a list of keywords that can be used in the Invitation emails in KindooSaveVerifiedKindooUserMasterLicenseInvitationEmailByLanguage and KindooSaveNewUserMasterLicenseInvitationEmailByLanguage functions
Get by language the custom master license invitation email sent to an existing Kindoo user. You can call KindooGetAvailableLanguages function to get all the available languages in Kindoo

IsoLanguageCode.description: KindooGetAvailableLanguages function returns all the languages available in Kindoo

post.summary: Get by language the custom master license invitation email sent to a user that does not have a verified account in Kindoo. call KindooGetAvailableLanguages function to get all the available languages in Kindoo

IsoLanguageCode.description: KindooGetAvailableLanguages function returns all the languages available in Kindoo

post.summary: Sets the Kindoo master license invitation email for a given language that is sent to a user that does have the KINDOO application.. If email subject and body are set to empty for a given language, the English saved version will be used. If the English saved version is empty, the default KINDOO email will be used.

IsoLanguageCode.description: KindooGetAvailableLanguages function returns all the languages available in Kindoo

post.summary: Sets the Kindoo master license invitation email for a given language that is sent to a user that does not yet have the KINDOO application. If email subject and body are set to empty for a given language, the English saved version will be used. If the English saved version is empty, the default KINDOO email will be used.

IsoLanguageCode.description: KindooGetAvailableLanguages function returns all the languages available in Kindoo

post.summary: Delete the master license invitation email sent to an existing Kindoo user and use the Kindoo default email instead
